# When2Tool Adapter

This folder contains small pieces needed to align this project with the original When2Tool label-generation method.

- `env_schemas/*.json` are copied from the official When2Tool `envs/` directory.
- They are used only to reconstruct the tool schemas shown to the model by the chat template.
- Full datasets, model weights, generated labels, and evaluation outputs are not stored here.

Source: https://github.com/Trustworthy-ML-Lab/when2tool
